• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with AI-powered answer generation via Puter.js
  • Supports 5 customizable response tones: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast
  • Includes 3D WebGL particle effects, shake animations, and dynamic ball visuals
    puter.ai.chat(systemPrompt)
    particles.rotation.y += baseRotationSpeed

This web app simulates a classic Magic 8 Ball with AI-generated responses. Users choose a personality tone, input a question, and receive a concise styled answer. The interface features 3D particle effects, shake animations, and a WebGL background inside the ball.
